caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. His shirt features white text that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned behind a black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt, and various garments hang on racks. Two logos are visible on the screen: a circular one on the left and a red text logo on the right that reads "BODILY FLUIDS TOT". As the sequence progresses, the man's expression shifts; he starts with a neutral, talking expression and gesturing with his hands, and by the final frame, he is laughing with his eyes closed and mouth open. The background and equipment remain static throughout the scene.
